item.title: Yes this is eugenics
item.description:
Yes this is eugenics. This is weird and it should be rejected in its totality. They don’t care about any scientific basis of it, they care that it promotes thier understanding of masculinity



(Feed generated with FetchRSS)

item.title: Your passport entitles you to nothing, accepting the case of American passport which may be justifies a little more mistreatment
item.description:
Your passport entitles you to nothing, accepting the case of American passport which may be justifies a little more mistreatment

item.title: It is absurd and racist to identify the problems with ICE as only those that make it harder for those of us whose rights are act...
item.description:
It is absurd and racist to identify the problems with ICE as only those that make it harder for those of us whose rights are actully respected to use those rights. Bc identification and body cams have nvr helped the thousands the cops have hurt



(Feed generated with FetchRSS)

item.title: Not everything they do is a performance because it can’t be so all you have to do to look past the performance is find the parts...
item.description:
Not everything they do is a performance because it can’t be so all you have to do to look past the performance is find the parts where they’re not perform#greenscreenvideo

item.title: That’s just suchhhhh a RANDOM thing to happen, so rly random that clavicular got set up with a literal propagandist for the IDF
